pageContext.name: Star Guardian Zoe
pageContext.description: 'Yes! This'll be fun! Right?'  Sideshow and Good Smile Arts Shanghai are excited to present Star Guardian Zoe from the globally popular esports game 'League of Legends!'   The impressively sized figure features detailed sculpting of Zoe's long flowing hair, her Portal Jump ability, and more! Her hair and the magic effect parts have been created with the use of translucent parts.  Be sure to add Star Guardian Zoe to your collection today!
